Footer.description: An amateur sports association promoting free futsal and psychological support for children aged 4–12 in Elmas, Sardinia.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 ASD Sardinia United. All rights reserved.

Hero.subtitle: The right to play and grow should not depend on your wallet. We are building the future of Sardinian youth, one ball at a time.

Mission.quote: "Sport as an educational right and inclusion - without economic barriers."
Mission.body: ASD Sardinia United was born from the desire to break down every obstacle between young people and the playing field. We offer sporting excellence at zero cost for families.

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: A simple model for real impact
HowItWorks.card1Body: Sessions led by qualified coaches, sports kit included and access to the best local facilities.
HowItWorks.card2Body: A team of experts supports the emotional and social growth of young people, preventing youth distress.
HowItWorks.card3Body: Active citizenship and volunteering workshops to develop not just athletes, but responsible individuals.

Targets.title: Who this project is for
Targets.target1Body: Minors living in at-risk areas who lack access to extracurricular activities.
Targets.target2Body: Concrete support to relieve families from the financial burden of sports education.
Targets.target3Body: Real integration through the universal language of sport and teamwork.

DonationCta.title: Every donation is worth a future
DonationCta.body: With €500 you cover a child's sports expenses for an entire year.

Blog.title: Latest News
Blog.comingSoonBody: The blog isn't active yet because the project is about to launch. Soon we'll share updates on futsal training, our sports psychologist's work, and stories from the children and families involved. To get started, we need everyone's help!
Blog.post1Title: Inauguration of the new field in Elmas
Blog.post1Excerpt: A historic moment for our association and the entire local community.
Blog.post2Excerpt: Discover how our 20 volunteers are changing the perception of social sport.
Blog.post3Excerpt: We welcome three new Sardinian companies investing in the future of young people.

Newsletter.title: Stay updated
Newsletter.body: Receive our impact stories and biannual reports directly in your inbox.
Newsletter.success: Thank you! You've been subscribed to our newsletter.

Donazioni.title: Choose how to support us
Donazioni.subtitle: Your donation allows a child to discover sport.
Donazioni.impact10: you provide 2 training bibs for our young athletes.
Donazioni.impact15: you provide a futsal ball for the weekly training sessions.
Donazioni.impact30: you provide an official match kit for a young athlete.
Donazioni.impact50: you cover shirt, shorts and socks for a child for the entire season.
Donazioni.impact120: you cover kits, bags and full match gear for 2 children.
Donazioni.yaplaNote: You will be redirected to the Yapla platform for secure payment
Donazioni.testimonialQuote: «Without ASD Sardinia United we couldn't have let our son play. The team became his second family.»

Calendario.heroSubtitle: The Sport for All project is about to come to life. We're finalizing the official launch date - stay tuned!
Calendario.announcementBody: We're in the final stages of planning. Soon we'll announce the official inauguration date, featuring an open day for children, families, institutions and sponsors.
Calendario.highlight1: First friendly tournament with local teams
Calendario.highlight2: Open day for families and registrations
Calendario.highlight3: Official presentation of staff and programme
Calendario.ctaBody: Follow us on social media or support the project with a donation. Every contribution brings us closer to kick-off.

Blog.heroSubtitle: The blog isn't active yet because the project is about to launch. Soon we'll share the stories of our young athletes.
Blog.announcementTitle: To get started, we need everyone
Blog.announcementBody: We're finalizing preparations for the launch of the Sport for All project. As soon as futsal training sessions and sports psychology sessions begin, this space will fill up with updates, photos and stories from the field.
Blog.topic2: The sports psychologist's work with the youth
Blog.topic3: Stories from families and the Elmas community
Blog.ctaBody: Every contribution brings us closer to the first kick-off. Support the project or follow us on Instagram so you don't miss the launch!
Blog.author: ASD Sardinia United Editorial Team
Blog.notFoundBody: The article you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
Blog.articleBody1: This article is a placeholder: we'll soon share updates, numbers and stories from the field. In the meantime, thank you to everyone who supports the project and makes every training session possible.
Blog.articleBody2: Sport is an educational right and a tool for inclusion. Every day we work to ensure no child is left out of the game for economic or social reasons.
Blog.articleBody3: Our futsal programme, combined with the work of our sports psychologist, aims to help children grow — not just as athletes, but as confident, resilient individuals.
Blog.articleBody4: For information or to collaborate with ASD Sardinia United, please contact us through the official channels on our website. Together we build a fairer future through futsal and team values.

Sponsor.heroTitle: Become a Sport for All Sponsor
Sponsor.heroSubtitle: Four partnership levels available to support Sardinian youth and sport.
Sponsor.packagesSubtitle: Invest in local athletes' futures with multichannel visibility and ethical brand return.
Sponsor.mainBenefit1: Main logo on jerseys and van
Sponsor.inKindSubtitle: You can also support us by providing essential services and products for our activities.
Sponsor.inKind1Body: Supply of balls, training kits, hurdles and technical materials for youth sessions.
Sponsor.inKind2Body: Physiotherapy, nutritional consulting or legal/administrative support for the organization.
Sponsor.inKind3Body: Transport for away games, hospitality or spaces for events and meetings.

ChiSiamo.heroImageAlt: Wide view of a football pitch in use
ChiSiamo.heroSubtitle: ASD Sardinia United was born from a passion for sport and the belief that every child has the right to play.
ChiSiamo.storyQuote: "Sport is the universal language of inclusion."
ChiSiamo.storyP1: Founded in the heart of Elmas, the Amateur Sports Association Sardinia United is not just a sports club, but a laboratory of active citizenship and social cohesion. Our story is rooted in Sardinian territory, with the aim of breaking down the economic and social barriers that often prevent young people from accessing sport.
ChiSiamo.storyP2: We use futsal as an educational vehicle, supported by a sports psychologist who guides the children through their emotional and relational growth. We guarantee completely free access for struggling families, ensuring that talent and passion are never held back by income.
ChiSiamo.storyP3: Today we are a team of UEFA-qualified coaches, a sports psychologist, fundraisers and volunteers, all united by the vision of a Sardinia where sport is a guaranteed right and a growth engine for the entire community.
ChiSiamo.storyImageAlt: Group of people together in a sporting and community setting
ChiSiamo.team1Bio: Institutional leader and driving force behind the project, Dante coordinates activities and the association's strategic vision.
ChiSiamo.team2Bio: UEFA-licensed coach, bringing professional expertise and passion to the futsal pitch.
ChiSiamo.team3Bio: Supports the technical work on the field, dedicated to the sporting growth of young athletes.
ChiSiamo.team4Bio: Supports the emotional and psychological growth of the children through group sessions and individual programmes.
ChiSiamo.team5Bio: Coordinates fundraising campaigns, donor relations and strategic partnerships.
ChiSiamo.team6Bio: Psychologist and developer, combining technical skills and human sensitivity to support the project at every level.
ChiSiamo.govQuote: "Our transparency is the pillar on which we build trust with families and partners."

Sponsor.heroSubtitle: Choose the package that fits your company and support young athletes in Elmas with shared visibility and values.

Sponsor.inKind1Body: Balls, kits, training gear-everything needed to play safely.
Sponsor.inKind2Body: Legal, comms, design, maintenance: your expertise for the community.
Sponsor.inKind3Body: Facilities, transport, hospitality for events and tournaments.
